inter-Registration Process For Undergraduate Programs

1. After arrival to Istanbul, you need to complete your registration to Kadir Has University by visiting Cibali campus.

Original documents to be submitted to the registration office and the payment of the 1st installment to be paid at university’s AKBANK branch.

Required documents:

High School Diploma (original and translation to Turkish or English)

High School Transcript (original and translation to Turkish or English)

High School Equivalence paper

(Denklik)

International/Local Exam score (if the applicant has), in Turkish or English

English proficiency exam results accepted by Kadir Has University / KHAS English Proficiency exam results

Passport copy

2 photographs

2. High School Equivalence paper

(Denklik)

High School Equivalence paper is required to be submitted during the registartion process for Undergraduate programs.

The detailed information on how to obtain the document can be checked at the following link:

(Link for PDF to be shared)

Student Certificate can be obtained after the registration to University. The certificate will be required for the Student Resident permit application, transportation card, etc.

Certificate must be requested from the Directorate of Student Affairs.

4. Start the process of the Student Resident Permit application.

The detailed information on how to apply for the Student Resident Permit can be checked at the following link:

(Link for the Visa and Resident permit page to be shared)
